ExpAndLn_AreInverses_ForPositiveRealNumber() 

[Fact]
public void ExpAndLn_AreInverses_ForPositiveRealNumber()

Exp_Works(float, float, float, float) 

[Theory]
[InlineData(new object[] { 0, 0, 1, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 1, 0, 2.718282, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 0, 3.1415927, -1, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 1, 3.1415927, -2.718282, 0 })]
public void Exp_Works(float real, float imaginary, float expectedReal, float expectedImaginary)

Parameters

real float
imaginary float
expectedReal float
expectedImaginary float

Ln_Works(float, float, float, float) 

[Theory]
[InlineData(new object[] { 1, 0, 0, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 2.7182817, 0, 1, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { -1, 0, 0, 3.1415927 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 0, 1, 0, 1.5707964 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 3, 4, 1.609438, 0.927295 })]
public void Ln_Works(float real, float imaginary, float expectedReal, float expectedImaginary)

Parameters

real float
imaginary float
expectedReal float
expectedImaginary float

Log_Works(float, float, float, float, float, float) 

[Theory]
[InlineData(new object[] { 8, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 100, 0, 10, 0, 2, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 1, 0, 10, 0, 0, 0 })]
public void Log_Works(float valueReal, float valueImaginary, float baseReal, float baseImaginary, float expectedReal, float expectedImaginary)

Parameters

valueReal float
valueImaginary float
baseReal float
baseImaginary float
expectedReal float
expectedImaginary float

Pow_Works(float, float, float, float, float, float) 

[Theory]
[InlineData(new object[] { 2, 0, 3, 0, 8, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 4, 0, 0.5, 0, 2, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { -1, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 2.7182817, 0, 0, 3.1415927, -1, 0 })]
public void Pow_Works(float baseReal, float baseImaginary, float exponentReal, float exponentImaginary, float expectedReal, float expectedImaginary)

Parameters

baseReal float
baseImaginary float
exponentReal float
exponentImaginary float
expectedReal float
expectedImaginary float

Sqrt_ResultSquared_EqualsOriginal() 

[Fact]
public void Sqrt_ResultSquared_EqualsOriginal()

Sqrt_Works(float, float, float, float) 

[Theory]
[InlineData(new object[] { 4, 0, 2, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 0, 4, 1.414214, 1.414214 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { -4, 0, 0, 2 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 3, 4, 2, 1 })]
public void Sqrt_Works(float real, float imaginary, float expectedReal, float expectedImaginary)

Parameters

real float
imaginary float
expectedReal float
expectedImaginary float
